overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a third-person perspective showing an armored hunter first observing a vast desert savanna from a rocky cliff, then mounting a bird-like creature (Seikret) to ride through golden grasslands and cross a shallow river. The environment features dramatic spiral rock formations, acacia-style trees, and distant mountains under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert overlook with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: standing on a rocky outcrop and slowly panning the camera to survey the vast desert landscape, distant mountains, and the spiral rock formation

entered.detail: flat-topped rock formation where the character stands, providing an elevated view
distinctive twisted spiral rock formation visible in the distance
hazy mountain peaks forming the horizon backdrop
small green shrub growing on the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky desert overlook, panning the camera across a vast arid landscape. The distinctive spiral rock monolith dominates the distant view while mountains rise on the horizon under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: savanna grassland with scattered acacia trees

events.description: character mounts the seikret bird-creature and begins riding through the tall grass
approaching the river bank, ground surface transitions from grass to muddy terrain

agents.ego_description: riding the bird-like mount at a steady pace through tall golden grass toward the river, with a feline companion seated behind

notable_agents.action: feline companion (Palico) riding on the back of the mount behind the player character

entered.detail: umbrella-shaped savanna tree with green canopy
tall thin rock pillar rising from the grassland
muddy approach leading down to the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The hunter mounts the Seikret and rides through golden savanna grass, passing acacia trees while approaching a river. The spiral rock monolith remains visible in the distance as the terrain gradually becomes muddier near the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with wildlife on muddy banks

events.description: mount enters the shallow river water, creating splashes as it wades through the current
passing large creatures resting on the right riverbank

agents.ego_description: steadily riding through knee-deep water, navigating between submerged grass patches and rock outcrops

notable_agents.action: large hippo-like creatures resting on the muddy riverbank

entered.detail: shallow brown water covering the ground, creating splashes as the mount moves
rocky cliff face along the left riverbank
large dark creatures resting on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The mount wades through the shallow river, water splashing around its legs as it crosses. Large creatures rest on the right bank while rocky cliffs line the left. The spiral rock monolith shifts toward the center of the view as the crossing continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy wetland trail with scattered boulders

events.description: exiting the water onto muddy ground, continuing the ride across the wetland
slight turn to navigate around scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: riding across the muddy terrain leaving the river behind, heading toward distant rock spires and the spiral monolith

entered.detail: small boulders and rock debris on the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the mount trots across muddy wetland terrain scattered with rocks. The spiral rock monolith comes back into view on the left as the character continues exploring the vast savanna landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a panoramic view from a rocky height and descends into a journey across a vast, golden savanna. It begins on a desert overlook, panning across an arid landscape dominated by a distant spiral rock monolith and far-off mountains under a bright blue sky. As the hunter mounts a Seikret, the perspective shifts to a ride through golden grasslands and acacia trees, with the terrain gradually becoming muddier as the mount approaches a river. The scene then transitions into a crossing of the shallow water, splashing past resting creatures and rocky cliffs while the spiral monolith shifts toward the center of the frame. Finally, the camera follows the mount as it trots across a muddy wetland scattered with rocks, with the monolith remaining visible to the left against the expansive horizon.
